title: hytale visuals and textures
description: this mod adds hytale elements into minecraft like grass and stone and shaders without fps loss and all of the other textures from the cracked ores texture pack this also requires the sodium core shader support mod
body: this texture pack adds the grass texture and stone texture from hytale and all of the contents of the cracked ores mod (by me) this mod also adds shaders without dropping fps,please tell me if you have any questions at my email i will implement them if i want to
